column1: # Local corrections to data/phonology.tsv (upstream 平水韵 / 词林正韵 dataset).
# Each non-comment row is MERGED into the upstream entry (tones and rhyme groups
# are unioned), so this file only needs to list what upstream is missing.
#   tones        : any of 平 上 去 入
#   pingshui-groups : comma list of TAG:NAME, TAG in {P=平,S=上,Q=去,R=入}
#   cilin-bu     : comma list of 词林正韵 部
# Found while validating against canonical rhyming poems:
